title: Welcome to Interactive Math
text:
Test \(f(x) = \frac{1}{x}\)
Test 2 \(g(x)= 3f(x)\)
Welcome! This website is designed to give you complete control over your learning. Every lesson features dynamic problems that change numbers every time you refresh or click a button, giving you infinite opportunities to practice.






TipHow to use this site




Select a lesson from the top navigation bar.
Read the concept overview.
Use the interactive sliders to see how math graphs change in real-time.
Try the practice problems and type your answers into the check-boxes to test your understanding.

title: Welcome to Interactive Math
text:
Quick Math Warm-Up
Test your mental math before diving into the lessons. Change the multiplier below to see how the sequence changes!

viewof factor = html`<input type="range" min="1" max="12" value="5" step="1">`
